name.value: - name: Upload coverage data uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2 with: name: coverage-data path: ".coverage.*" if-no-files-found: ignore

value.value:
- name: Upload coverage data
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: coverage-data
          path: ".coverage.*"
          if-no-files-found: ignore

name.value: coverage: name: Combine & check coverage. runs-on: ubuntu-latest needs: tests steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v2 - uses: actions/setup-python@v2 with: # Use latest, so it understands all syntax. python-version: "3.10" - run: python -m pip install --upgrade coverage[toml] - name: Download coverage data. uses: actions/download-artifact@v2 with: name: coverage-data - name: Combine coverage & fail if it's <100%. run: | python -m coverage combine

value.value:
coverage:
    name: Combine & check coverage.
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: tests
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          # Use latest, so it understands all syntax.
          python-version: "3.10"

      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade coverage[toml]

      - name: Download coverage data.
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: coverage-data

      - name: Combine coverage & fail if it's <100%.
        run: |
          python -m coverage combine
